channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Fantilli and Greaves are the latest contributors in keeping the Blue Jackets' playoff hopes going
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Johnny Gaudreau's jersey has occupied a stall in the Columbus Blue Jackets' locker room all season after his tragic death last summer. With two games left in the regular season, his teammates are trying to extend their inspirational run into the playoffs.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Rory McIlroy wins Masters playoff to complete the career Grand Slam
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — The closer Rory McIlroy came to fulfilling his lifetime dream — winning the Masters — the more it kept slipping away. Sunday at Augusta National felt like his last 11 years in the majors, blunders mixed in with sheer brilliance. A two-shot lead gone in two holes.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: After a wayward Sunday at the Masters, Bryson DeChambeau is 'super excited' about tweaking his gear
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — Bryson DeChambeau believed his game was in good enough shape to win the Masters. He certainly thought he could do it after he leapfrogged Rory McIlroy to take the lead two holes into the final round Sunday.
item.dc:creator: BEN NUCKOLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Justin Rose played a memorable round at the Masters. It wasn't enough to deny Rory McIlroy the title
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — Justin Rose kept hitting balls to stay loose at the tournament practice facility, all alone save for longtime caddie Mark Fulcher, everything eerily quiet around him while drama was unfolding elsewhere on Sunday at the Masters.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Kyren Lacy led deputies on police chase before dying of 'self-inflicted gunshot wound,' officials say
item.description: Texas officials release details surrounding the death of former LSU Tigers star wide receiver Kyren Lacy on Sunday after he was pronounced dead Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Kyle Larson dominates and claims an emotional Cup victory at Bristol Motor Speedway
item.description: With added motivation to honor a late friend, Kyle Larson seemed to have an extra gear Sunday at Bristol Motor Speedway. The Hendrick Motorsports star led 411 of 500 laps in a victory that was dominant as it was emotional.
item.dc:creator: NATE RYAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Palou finally loses as IndyCar champ's 2-race winning streak snapped by Kirkwood in Long Beach
item.description: Kyle Kirkwood showed that Alex Palou can be beat this IndyCar season and returned Andretti Global to the top of the podium with his second career victory at the Grand Prix of Long Beach.
item.dc:creator: Jenna Fryer, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Rory McIlroy beats Justin Rose in Masters playoff to win green jacket, complete Grand Slam
item.description: Rory McIlroy has beaten Justin Rose in a playoff hole to win the 89th edition of The Masters at Augusta National Golf Club on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Warriors' playoff seeding set after loss against Clippers in regular-season finale
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The Golden State Warriors' playoff path is set. They will play in the NBA Play-In Tournament following a home overtime loss to the Los Angeles Clippers in Sunday's regular-season finale. With the loss, the Warriors will face the Memphis Grizzlies on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Astros fan rips foul ball out of Angels star Mike Trout's glove in bizarre scene
item.description: Mike Trout had a Houston Astros fan rip a foul ball out of his glove on Saturday night, but unlike Mookie Betts' situation in the World Series, the fan had every right to do so.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bulls get ready for NBA play-in game with 122-102 win over 76ers in regular-season finale
item.description: Kevin Huerter hit five 3-pointers and scored 18 points and the Chicago Bulls warmed-up for the play-in game with a 122-102 win over the Philadelphia 76ers on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Report: Cubs' Justin Steele to undergo elbow surgery, done for the season
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago Cubs were dealt a heavy blow on the injury front Sunday evening. All-Star starting pitcher Justin Steele is done for the season, according to the Chicago Sun-Times.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Blazers sign coach Chauncey Billups to a multi-year extension
item.description: PORTLAND, Ore. (AP) — Coach Chauncey Billups has signed a multi-year contract extension with the Portland Trail Blazers. The Blazers did not release terms of the deal, announced before the regular-season finale against the Lakers on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: ANNE M. PETERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Late Van Dijk goal sees Liverpool move to within six points of the Premier League title
item.description: LIVERPOOL, England (AP) — Virgil van Dijk scored a late winner against West Ham on Sunday to move Liverpool within six points of the Premier League title.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ex-Michigan State guard Tre Holloman is transferring to NC State
item.description: Former Michigan State guard Tre Holloman is on his way to N.C. State. The Wolfpack shared one of Holloman’s social media posts Sunday that said he had committed to the school and showed him in its gear.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 89th Masters Tournament
item.description: Roars for Rory. The famous sound of Sunday at the Masters Tournament could be for Rory McIlroy (-12) this year.
item.dc:creator: John Hart, WGN 9

item.title: Cubs have big night in 16-0 rout of Dodgers, handing LA the worst home shutout loss in franchise history
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Los Angeles Dodgers franchise has been around since 1884, going back to its days in Brooklyn. And no team had ever done to the Dodgers in front of their home crowd what the Cubs did at Dodger Stadium on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: MIKE DIGIOVANNA, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Western Michigan wins its 1st Frozen Four hockey title, beating Boston University 6-2
item.description: ST. LOUIS (AP) — Owen Michaels didn’t hesitate after watching his shot slide into the open net with more than two minutes left to essentially seal Western Michigan’s first Frozen Four title in its first championship game.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Baldwin's pinch-hit single in 9th lifts White Sox over Red Sox 3-2
item.description: Pinch-hitter Brooks Baldwin lined an RBI single off Boston closer Aroldis Chapman with one out in the bottom of the ninth, lifting the Chicago White Sox to a 3-2 win over the Red Sox on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Rory McIlroy has masterful start at Augusta and closes in on career Grand Slam
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — The greatest start in the 91-year history of the Masters wasn't enough for Rory McIlroy. He delivered what looked to be a haymaker late Saturday afternoon, a 6-iron so majestic and pure that he walked 10 yards before he saw it land 6 feet away for eagle on the 15th hole.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Rory McIlroy chips in eagle, Bryson DeChambeau sinks deep birdie to start Masters third round with fireworks
item.description: Rory McIlroy and Bryson DeChambeau made Masters fireworks during the third round at Augusta National on Saturday, burying eagles and birdies to sit at the top of the leaderboard.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Phil Wertman Invitational: GJ's Bryce Flanagan dominates 800m and more
item.description: The sun scorched down on Stocker Stadium Friday for the Phil Wertman Invitational. But the heat did not stop many of the Western Slope's top athletes from showing off their speed, power and verticals.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Julian Phillips scores a career-high 23 points and Bulls rout Wizards 119-89
item.description: Julian Phillips scored a career-high 23 points on 7-of-9 shooting, Nikola Vucevic finished with 15 points, 12 rebounds and eight assists and the Chicago Bulls beat the Washington Wizards 119-89 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Blackhawks host the Jets following Foligno's 2-goal game
item.description: Winnipeg Jets (54-21-4, in the Central Division) vs. Chicago Blackhawks (23-46-10, in the Central Division) Chicago; Saturday, 7 p.m. EDT BOTTOM LINE: The Chicago Blackhawks host the Winnipeg Jets after Nick Foligno's two-goal game against the Boston Bruins in the Blackhawks' 5-2 win.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Bulls beat Heat behind Giddey's triple-double, move ahead of Miami for play-in home game
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — The Bulls have just one game left at the United Center on their regular-season schedule. But they took a big step toward securing at least one more home game for the Eastern Conference play-in tournament.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Congrats to Beth - the Beat Big Will Bracket Challenge Winner
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — The final buzzer has sounded. The confetti has fallen. The Florida Gators are National Champions. KREX Sports Anchor Big Will Levenson was in the building to watch his Alma Mater Florida rise to the top of the College Basketball World. "Greatest experience of my life.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Cavaliers claim the No. 1 seed in the Eastern Conference with a 135-113 win over the Bulls
item.description: Darius Garland scored 28 points, Evan Mobley had 21 points, 11 rebounds and seven assists and the Cleveland Cavaliers clinched the top seed in the Eastern Conference with a 135-113 win over the Chicago Bulls on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Nolan Jones draws walk with bases-loaded to give Guardians 1-0 victory over White Sox in home opener
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Nolan Jones drew a bases-loaded walk from Mike Clevinger in the ninth inning, and the Cleveland Guardians won their home opener 1-0 over the Chicago White Sox on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Nuggets fire head coach, GM with three games remaining before the playoffs
item.description: The decision comes as the Nuggets only have three regular-season games remaining before the NBA playoffs.
item.dc:creator: Spencer Kristensen, NewsNation

item.title: 49ers star’s high school retired his jersey
item.description: (KRON) – For the first time, a Colorado high school has retired a jersey for one of its former students. That alum was none other than San Francisco 49ers star Christian McCaffrey. Valor Christian High School recently retired McCaffrey’s No.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: Florida makes push all the way to NCAA title game, will face Houston team that pushes others around
item.description: Florida has gone from being picked to finish sixth in the rugged Southeastern Conference to pushing all the way to the final Monday night of the season.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS AP Sports Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: UConn returns to top of women's basketball, dominates South Carolina 82-59 to capture its 12th title
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — During the final sweet moments of UConn’s 12th national title, Geno Auriemma and Paige Bueckers embraced after the star guard departed her final game with the Huskies. It was the moment they wanted all along. “They’ve all been gratifying, don’t get me wrong," Auriemma said.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, NewsNation
